full_text:
Dong Junya 董君雅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Junya (董君雅). Was Colonel of Lunshi, Yingchuan. Father of Dong Zhuo. Dong Junya was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
